page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Find rho-independent transcription terminators in bacterial genomes
page_metadata.biotools__summary: TransTermHP finds rho-independent transcription terminators in bacterial genomes. Each terminator found by the program is assigned a confidence value that estimates its probability of being a true terminator
